/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/plotlib.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libplotlib.so -o libplotlib.so CMakeFiles/plotlib.dir/plotlib_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/plotlib.dir/plotlib.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/bfr/devel/github_procmt_2021/procmt_2021/out/build/Clang 19.1.7 x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/qcustomplot:" ../../qcustomplot/libqcustomplot.so /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6PrintSupport.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
